Package global.thalion.ttio.providers

Interface StorageGroup

All Superinterfaces:
AutoCloseable
public interface StorageGroup extends AutoCloseable
Named directory of subgroups, datasets, and attributes.

API status: Stable (Provisional per M39 — may change before v1.0).

Cross-language equivalents: Objective-C TTIOStorageGroup, Python ttio.providers.base.StorageGroup.

    • createDatasetND

      default StorageDataset createDatasetND(String name, Enums.Precision precision, long[] shape, long[] chunks, Enums.Compression compression, int compressionLevel)
      Create a multi-dimensional dataset. 1-D delegates to createDataset(java.lang.String, global.thalion.ttio.Enums.Precision, long, int, global.thalion.ttio.Enums.Compression, int); higher ranks require provider override.

    • createCompoundDataset

      StorageDataset createCompoundDataset(String name, List<CompoundField> fields, long count)
      Create a 1-D compound dataset.
